text: Competitive dynamics in the payments industry remain active, with Visa and Mastercard proposing a settlement in their long-running legal dispute with merchants over interchange fees, which could potentially affect rewards credit card dynamics across the industry. Visa has also advanced into stablecoin payments with a pilot program enabling instant crypto payouts via Visa Direct, marking competitive pressure in blockchain-powered payments. These industry developments may influence the broader competitive positioning for American Express within the global payments landscape.
